intended_use: DrAid™ for Liver Segmentation is a web-based software, non-invasive image analysis application designed for the visualization, evaluation, and reporting of liver and physician identified lesions using
intended_use_full: DrAid™ for Liver Segmentation is a web-based software, non-invasive image analysis application designed for the visualization, evaluation, and reporting of liver and physician identified lesions using multiphase images (with slice thickness <= 3.0mm) of patients aged and older than 22 years old obtained from CT scanners. The software provides a range of tools for image viewing, processing, and reporting.
target_condition: Liver lesions and liver abnormalities (including cirrhosis, steatosis, hepatomegaly)
ground_truth: Annotations provided by 3 US board-certified radiologists
other_metrics: Liver Segmentation - Dice score: Mean ± std 0.9649 ± 0.0195, 95% CI [0.9631, 0.9667]; Hausdorff Distance (HD95): Mean ± std 1.7061 ± 1.5800, 95% CI [1.5595, 1.8526]. Liver Volume Measurement - Normalized Volume Error (NVE): Mean ± std 2.7269% ± 3.1928%, 95% CI [2.4308%, 3.0230%]
